steps.title: Notice the contrast in distances between the examples
steps.content: The two ultramarathons are 37.3 miles and 261 miles—far apart on the length spectrum. This dramatic range signals what the generalization should address.

steps.title: Find the choice that generalizes from this range
steps.content: Choice C does exactly this: Ultramarathons range widely in length, from a few dozen miles to a few hundred—it uses the two specific examples to support a broad statement about the category. The others don't generalize: A just lists examples, B contrasts ultras with marathons rather than characterizing the ultramarathon category, and D highlights duration instead of length. That matches choice C — C is correct.
